```py
glm <- glm(
  log_Energy ~ Training_time_hour + 
               Hardware_quantity + 
               Training_hardware,
               data = df)
summary(glm)

glm_random_effects <- glmer(
  log_Energy ~ Training_time_hour + 
               Hardware_quantity + 
               Training_hardware + 
               (1 | Organization), // Random effects
               data = df)
summary(glm_random_effects)
AIC(glm_random_effects)
```
